title: Keybind Changer
description: Lets you set specific keybinds without going into settings!
body:
## Keybind Changer

With this mod change keybinds before the game starts so you can set up pre-built keybinds.
If you find an issue report it on the bug tracker.

### Current keybinds

All keybinds can be set in a config file if you use 2.0 or later.
The config file is in the config folder the and the file is labled keybind-changer-config.json in there you can change the what key shoud be set to what.

## Compatibility

This mod is compatible with any other mod.

## Recommended mod if you want to hide keys or sections 
I recommend this if you want to hide a key or an entire section use this mod.

[https://modrinth.com/mod/keybindhider](https://modrinth.com/mod/keybindhider)
